title: Davaab-type starfighter

{{Quote|We need to know what ''utreekov'' parked the Davaab fighter on top of the -- what is this? The Highport Banking Tower. We need the space for the new receiver platform. Get up here and get your ship before we push it over the side.|[[Koblus Sornell]]|<ref name="Interference">{{Hyperspace|url=hyperspace/fiction/interference20090929.html|text="Interference"|int=Interference|newhost=Suvudu}}</ref>}}
The '''Davaab-type starfighter''' was a type of [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] used by the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorians]] from before and during the [[Mandalorian Wars]].

==Characteristics==
[[File:Fighter1mandoa.jpg|thumb|left|100px|A ''Davaab''-type starfighter's cockpit.]]
Its name derived from the [[Mando'a/Legends|Mando'a]] word for "carrying out" and "execution," the fighter was used by the Mandalorians for [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ship]] protection. The 8.8 meter long Davaab starfighter was wide, boasting asymmetrical wings: a longer, bent fin-shape wing and a shorter wing with a cannon. A bubble canopy allowed the pilot to see his immediate surroundings.<ref name="SWKOTOR:FP" /> The craft was designed to land with each wing rotated horizontally, similar to the operation of the [[A/SF-01 B-wing starfighter/Legends|B-wing starfighter]] millennia later.<ref name="SWEVI:ROTJ">{{Film|VI}}</ref>

It was based on a heavily modified [[Core Galaxy Systems]] model from before the Great Sith War,<ref name="KOTORCG" /> and could be seen in many variations under the [[Mandalorian Crusaders]] owners. By the time the [[Mandalorian Neo-Crusaders/Legends|Neo-Crusaders]] ideals began spreading throughout the Mandalorian forces, the type was mass produced in their war forges, supplying new warriors with a more recognizable model.<ref name="KOTORCG" />

==History==
Although unknown when they first became used by the Mandalorians, the Davaab-type fighter saw action during the Mandalorian's conquest on the outer rim.<ref name="SWKOTOR:FP" /> Mandalorian Crusaders saw the Davaab starfighters as objects of personal pride,<ref name="KOTORCG" /> and willingly invested their personal time and resources on modifications and upgrades.

During the expansion of the Neo-Crusader doctrine, the Davaab fighter took a more uniform look. Many older Mandalorians, annoyed by the new fighter's stock package and lack of interior comforts, began modifying the fighters like before in secret and behind the backs of their [[Rally Master]]s.<ref name="KOTORCG" /> A number of these fighters fought in the [[Battle of Vanquo]] and later in the [[Taris Siege|Invasion of Taris]].<ref name="SWKOTOR16:NOAP1">[[Knights of the Old Republic 16|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 16]]</ref><ref name="SWKOTOR22:KOSP1">[[Knights of the Old Republic 22|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 22]]</ref> Following the subjugation of the [[Upper City]], these fighters patrolled the skylanes while the ground troops moved to the lower levels of the planet-wide city.<ref name="SWKOTOR22:KOSP1">[[Knights of the Old Republic 22|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 22]]</ref>
